prompt: I need to understand what tokens are available when a component is placed inside <Surface mode='bg-subtle'>. Specifically, what text colors, border colors, and accent colors can I use? And how do they differ from the default surface?

assertions.name: lists-on-colour-tokens
assertions.description: Lists most or all of the 9 on-colour tokens available (High, Medium-Text, Low-Text, Medium-Stroke, Low-Stroke, Accent, Accent-A11y, Hover, Pressed)

assertions.name: mentions-on-subtle-context
assertions.description: Mentions that bg-subtle uses the 'on-subtle' on-colour context (different from default's 'on-default' context)

assertions.name: explains-differences-from-default
assertions.description: Explains how bg-subtle on-colours differ from default — e.g. strokes are blended against the subtle surface, or mentions the +10 step stroke offset vs +8 on default

assertions.name: uses-correct-token-names
assertions.description: Provides actual token names following the naming convention (e.g. --Primary-BG-Subtle-High, --Primary-BG-Subtle-Accent-A11y)
